scripts.dev:backend: cd server && bash -c '(test -d venv || python3 -m venv venv) && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -r requirements.txt && python src/server.py'
scripts.backend: cd server && source venv/bin/activate && python3 src/server.py
scripts.setup:env:
test -f server/.env.local || (echo '
⚠️  Missing server/.env.local.' && echo '   Recommended: agora login && agora project create my-first-voice-agent --feature rtc --feature convoai && agora project use my-first-voice-agent && agora project env write server/.env.local --with-secrets' && echo '   Reference template: server/.env.example
' && exit 1)
scripts.setup:deps: test -d node_modules && echo 'Workspace dependencies already installed.' || (echo 'Missing workspace dependencies. Run bun install or npm install from the repo root.' && exit 1)
scripts.setup:backend: cd server && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install --upgrade pip && PIP_INDEX_URL=https://pypi.org/simple pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.setup:frontend: test -d node_modules && echo 'Workspace dependencies already installed.' || (echo 'Missing workspace dependencies. Run bun install or npm install from the repo root.' && exit 1)
scripts.setup:done:
echo '
✅ Setup complete! Next steps:' && echo '   1. Ensure server/.env.local exists (preferred: agora project env write server/.env.local --with-secrets)' && echo '   2. Run: bun run dev or npm run dev
'
scripts.verify:backend: cd server && PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/agora-agent-pycache" python3 -m py_compile src/server.py src/agent.py
scripts.clean: rm -rf server/venv server/__pycache__ server/src/__pycache__ node_modules web/node_modules web/.next web/dist
